scores.label: Architecture
evidence: Separated raw data, interpretation, exposure map, homepage command, and workbench layers.
gaps: Add more end-to-end live deployment checks.

scores.label: Visual direction
evidence: Homepage has command summary, exposure map, canonical holdings cards, and proportion tuning.
Charts were removed from homepage cards where they created false precision.
gaps: Design grammar is still assembled through injected modules; consolidate into one design system file later.

scores.label: Data integrity
evidence: Build validates strategy, workbenches, exposure map, chart cognition, and analytics surface.
gaps: Need source freshness stamps and historical snapshots for true change detection.

scores.label: Analytical depth
evidence: Added portfolio exposure buckets and cross-holding conflict interpretation.
Each holding has thesis status, action permission, urgency, confidence, and signal-change conditions.
gaps: Need real thesis dossiers, earnings revisions, expectation gap, and evidence-based action bands.

scores.label: Strategic usefulness
evidence: Homepage now answers what deserves attention and why today matters.
Blocked adds and portfolio conflicts are surfaced before individual cards.
gaps: Need daily delta: what changed since last run, what moved closer to action, what signal changed.

scores.label: Agent-readiness
evidence: Strategy JSON gives OpenClaw finance agent a structured write/read target.
Workbench pages now share the same interpreted object as homepage.
gaps: Need editable thesis registry and agent-authored source-backed notes.

nextLevers: Add daily change detection snapshots to explain what changed since last report.
Upgrade thesis registry from seeded notes to source-backed dossiers with invalidation logic.
Replace mechanical action bands with evidence-based bands from price history, volatility, cost basis, and valuation.
Add source freshness and confidence scoring for every external data field.
Consolidate injected CSS into a unified design system once analytical structure stabilizes.
